violations.text: Inspector observed hot and cold foods being received at incorrect temperatures. Chicken wraps were observed between 60-63F and pasta w/ meat sauce was observed between 112-121F. PIC called supervisor when food was received. Driver will pick up food to reheat at main kitchen. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025
American cheese was observed past the 7 day date marking. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

Forks and spoons at the self service area are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

2 door refrigerator located in the back kitchen hallway area was not in good repair (observed leak from inside condenser fan into bucket). Janitor stated work order has been placed prior to inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025
The wall tiles and coving in the kitchen area is in poor repair (broken tiles and coving). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The doors to the outside, located at the main entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
The wall tiles and coving in the kitchen area is in poor repair (broken tiles and coving). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024
The condensate from the (rear) 2 door refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment (slicer, mixer, etc.) or items were observed in the food prep area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024
The wall in the grease trap area is in poor repair. Opening observed. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024
Left faucet at 3 bay sink was observed leaking. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2023
Left faucet at 3 bay sink was observed leaking. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2023
